html: I think drugs are actually a great analogy. An initial feeling of "oh my god I have superhuman capabilities" followed by a hangover of "ohno I have created a mess". Especially with AI sycophancy where it's like "Great idea!" all the time. (I am well aware most my ideas are not great, thanks).  Honestly, even the way people talk about like vibe coding on their phones while they're with their kids or something, it almost sounds like a compulsion.
